name: Apache bRPC
description: Industrial-grade C++ RPC framework originated at Baidu with millions of instances in production.

seo.title: Apache bRPC — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Apache bRPC: Industrial-grade C++ RPC framework originated at Baidu with millions of instances in production.

when_to_use: Low-latency service communication in C++ backend
Load balancing and failover for internal services
Replace gRPC in performance-critical C++ systems

pros: Multiple protocol support in one stack
cons: C++ only limits adoption outside systems teams
review.verdict: If you need C++ RPC at hyperscale, bRPC is the real deal—elsewhere gRPC is the safer default.
review.best_for: C++ backend teams building high-throughput internal RPC services
review.not_for: Polyglot shops or teams that want large English-speaking community
